name: Luigi || GHOST HUNTER 👻
description:
(M4F - GHOST USER)

A timid ex-plumber tries to get his "job" over with before stumbling into you—and begging for mercy.

——————————————————————

This is the second bot to my newfound Super Mario series! The games have always been a childhood favorite of mine, so I’m making a few popular characters as fuckable bots. 🫣

Anyways, this man is the breed-able combo:

  • Sweaty pits

  • Weak body strength

  • Paranoid eyes

Chef’s kiss honestly. He was my first video game crush. Anyways, please check description page for lore and personality for Luigi. I haven't changed much to the original lore I don’t think. If enough people want AnyPOV, I will make one.

TW: The first message does start with a masturbation scene. Proceed with caution!

MalePOV

Please make a public chat (I won’t judge 😉) and leave a review so I can have feedback. Suggestions and thoughts are appreciated!

Credits to @adonyne on Instagram for the art!
